---
title: "Talks & Outreach"
description: "Scientific presentations and public engagement from the Caravagna Lab"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/build_talks_page.py. Edit content/talks-outreach/. -->
::: {.engagement-page}
::: {.hero .talks-hero style="--hero-image: url('content/images/talks-outreach-hero.png');"}
::: {.hero-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">Talks & Outreach</p>
<h1>Ideas shared beyond the lab.</h1>
<p>Scientific lectures, educational activities and public conversations about cancer data science, tumour evolution and artificial intelligence.</p>
<div class="engagement-links">
<a href="mailto:gcaravagna@units.it?subject=Invitation%20to%20speak%20%E2%80%94%20Caravagna%20Lab"><i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i> Invite us to speak</a>
</div>
:::
:::
<section class="engagement-section"><div class="engagement-section-heading"><p class="eyebrow">Scientific presentations</p><h2>Methods, data and tumour evolution.</h2><p>Selected lectures for researchers, students and interdisciplinary audiences.</p></div><div class="engagement-list"><article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2022</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLRwcSE2bmyBx9sMdz6iHT1bKm3SoVjDEl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Computational modelling of cancer sequencing data <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">ICTP–ICTS Winter School on Quantitative Systems Biology</p>
<p>A PhD-level course on computational modelling approaches for describing tumour evolution from sequencing data, delivered in three parts.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLRwcSE2bmyBx9sMdz6iHT1bKm3SoVjDEl" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Computational modelling of cancer sequencing data"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/n87fnIblV8g/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> 3 parts</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2022</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wof7EyMhlvo" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Reconciling intra-tumour heterogeneity from whole-genome sequencing with computational methods <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">P-care workshop</p>
<p>An introduction for biologists using computational methods to recover evolutionary dynamics from high-quality bulk sequencing data.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wof7EyMhlvo" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Reconciling intra-tumour heterogeneity from whole-genome sequencing with computational methods"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/Wof7EyMhlvo/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2022</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gdHOfk6Fz28" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Laboratory showreel <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">Caravagna Lab</p>
<p>A brief presentation of the research activities underway in the laboratory in 2022.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gdHOfk6Fz28" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Laboratory showreel"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/gdHOfk6Fz28/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2021</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wTRq_zB3LrI" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Measuring evolutionary dynamics from high-quality sequencing data <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">SISSA Cancer Data Science Seminar</p>
<p>An introduction for data scientists to evolutionary inference from bulk and single-cell cancer sequencing data.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wTRq_zB3LrI" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Measuring evolutionary dynamics from high-quality sequencing data"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/wTRq_zB3LrI/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article></div></section>
<section class="engagement-section engagement-outreach"><div class="engagement-section-heading"><p class="eyebrow">Outreach</p><h2>Computational science in public.</h2><p>Activities for schools, universities, science festivals and general audiences.</p></div><div class="engagement-list"><article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2024</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A3rDU5kMTnc" target="_blank" rel="noopener">La biologia e la medicina del futuro saranno quasi tutte computazionali? <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">Malnisio Science Festival · Italian</p>
<p>How human reasoning and computational power are changing our understanding of cancer cells and opening new directions in medicine.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A3rDU5kMTnc" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="La biologia e la medicina del futuro saranno quasi tutte computazionali?"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/A3rDU5kMTnc/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2023</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eHBuxrmo_tI" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Machine learning models to understand tumour evolution from next-generation sequencing data <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">AIRCampus · University of Cagliari · Italian</p>
<p>A lecture for students in Applied Informatics and Data Analytics.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eHBuxrmo_tI" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Machine learning models to understand tumour evolution from next-generation sequencing data"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/eHBuxrmo_tI/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2022</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abup3Bbhg7Y" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Applicazioni scientifiche dell’intelligenza artificiale <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">AI2S AI Talks · Italian</p>
<p>A general-audience presentation on applications of artificial intelligence across the life sciences.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abup3Bbhg7Y" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Applicazioni scientifiche dell’intelligenza artificiale"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/abup3Bbhg7Y/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Watch</span></a>
</article>
<article class="engagement-item">
<div class="engagement-year">2022</div>
<div>
<h3><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d8UZ-oRv9Ec" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Artificial intelligence and biological systems <i class="bi bi-play-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></a></h3>
<p class="engagement-meta">Podcast · with science communicator Enrico Schlitzer</p>
<p>A short conversation about how artificial intelligence is changing the way we understand biological systems.</p>
</div>
<a class="engagement-video" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d8UZ-oRv9Ec" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Artificial intelligence and biological systems"><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/d8UZ-oRv9Ec/hqdefault.jpg" alt=""><span><i class="bi bi-play-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i> Listen</span></a>
</article></div></section>
:::
